heading: Contributions and donations by foreign nationals
label: 30121 Contributions and donations by foreign nationals
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Congress, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 441e of Title 2

Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 314, and is classified to .section 319 of Pub. L. 92–225section 30115 of this titleAnother prior was renumbered section 318, and was classified to , The Congress, prior to repeal by .section 319 of Pub. L. 92–225section 439b of Title 2Pub. L. 96–187

Amendments2002—, substituted “Contributions and donations by foreign nationals” for “Contributions by foreign nationals” in section catchline.Pub. L. 107–155, § 303(1)Subsec. (a). , added subsec. (a) and struck out former subsec. (a) which read as follows: “It shall be unlawful for a foreign national directly or through any other person to make any contribution of money or other thing of value, or to promise expressly or impliedly to make any such contribution, in connection with an election to any political office or in connection with any primary election, convention, or caucus held to select candidates for any political office; or for any person to solicit, accept, or receive any such contribution from a foreign national.”Pub. L. 107–155, § 303(2)Subsec. (b)(2). , inserted “or a national of the United States (as defined in )” after “United States”.Pub. L. 107–155, § 317section 1101(a)(22) of title 8

children.label: A
children.text: a contribution or donation of money or other thing of value, or to make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or donation, in connection with a Federal, State, or local election;

children.label: B
children.text: a contribution or donation to a committee of a political party; or

children.label: C
children.text: an expenditure, independent expenditure, or disbursement for an electioneering communication (within the meaning of ); orsection 30104(f)(3) of this title
a person to solicit, accept, or receive a contribution or donation described in subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) from a foreign national.
a foreign principal, as such term is defined by , except that the term “foreign national” shall not include any individual who is a citizen of the United States; orsection 611(b) of title 22

an individual who is not a citizen of the United States or a national of the United States (as defined in ) and who is not lawfully admitted for permanent residence, as defined by .section 1101(a)(22) of title 8section 1101(a)(20) of title 8
